title: CD Projekt Red pranks Witcher fans with fake expansion news
author: Grant St. Clair

full_text:
Truly, The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is a game that keeps on giving. Two full expansions and countless small DLCs later, and CD Projekt Red's monster-slaying RPG masterpiece continues to evolve. If you've so much as looked at a gaming console in the past ten years, you've heard of The Witcher 3: deep and impactful player choices, an authentically miserable medieval Polish world to explore, a wide cast of monsters that only you, in the shoes of professional monster hunter Geralt of Rivia, can slay.

Its sequel is in active development, even, but apparently, CD Projekt just can't let this game go. One last add-on has been announced, letting you experience the Continent from a whole new perspective, and I have to tell you, I've never been more excited to dive back in:

VIDEO

…Okay, yeah, it's just CD Projekt's April Fools joke. Surprise! 

This "announcement" does come in the wake of swirling rumors that The Witcher 3 really will get another expansion soon, though, supposedly to bridge the gap between it and Witcher 4. While I'd take that with a hefty grain of salt (or fisstech, to be setting-appropriate), at least you'll be able to cuddle up to your very own Roach to dry your tears if it doesn't come out.
